data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring', but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions AI proctoring that flags if a candidate looks away too long, it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to validate the implementation of live monitoring or AI proctoring as required. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API checks provided to confirm the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
